title: Sanguozhi: Records of the Three Kingdoms (Chen Shou), Selection 7
description: From Sanguozhi: Records of the Three Kingdoms (Chen Shou): chapter 7
introduction: From Sanguozhi: Records of the Three Kingdoms (Chen Shou): chapter 7

translation.text: From Sanguozhi: Records of the Three Kingdoms (Chen Shou): A foundational chapter of one of China's official Twenty-Four Histories, recording the deeds, institutions, and biographies of an entire dynasty.
